$userId..validate: newData.val() === null || (newData.hasChildren(['is_typing']) && newData.childrenCount <= 3 && newData.child('is_typing').isBoolean() && (!newData.child('typing_speed').exists() || newData.child('typing_speed').isString()) && (!newData.child('last_seen').exists() || newData.child('last_seen').isString()))

newData.val() === null || (newData.hasChildren(['text', 'updated_at']) && newData.childrenCount <= 2 && newData.child('text').isString() && newData.child('text').val().length <= 5000 && newData.child('updated_at').isNumber())

$conversationId..write: auth != null && ((newData.child('is_frozen').val() === true && newData.child('frozen_by').val() === auth.uid) || (data.child('frozen_by').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('is_frozen').val() === false))

$signalId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['conversation_id', 'user_id', 'target_user_id', 'target_user_name', 'created_at']) && newData.childrenCount <= 6 && newData.child('conversation_id').val() === $conversationId && newData.child('user_id').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('target_user_id').isString() && newData.child('target_user_name').isString() && newData.child('target_user_name').val().length <= 120 && (!newData.child('recipient_user_id').exists() || newData.child('recipient_user_id').isString()) && newData.child('created_at').isNumber()

$viewerUserId..validate: newData.val() === null || (newData.hasChildren(['username', 'started_at', 'is_viewing']) && newData.childrenCount <= 5 && newData.child('username').isString() && newData.child('username').val().length <= 50 && (!newData.child('display_name').exists() || newData.child('display_name').isString()) && (!newData.child('avatar').exists() || newData.child('avatar').isString()) && newData.child('started_at').isNumber() && newData.child('is_viewing').isBoolean())

newData.val() === null || (newData.hasChildren(['username', 'started_at', 'is_viewing']) && newData.childrenCount <= 5 && newData.child('username').isString() && newData.child('username').val().length <= 50 && (!newData.child('display_name').exists() || newData.child('display_name').isString()) && (!newData.child('avatar').exists() || newData.child('avatar').isString()) && newData.child('started_at').isNumber() && newData.child('is_viewing').isBoolean())

$postId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['count', 'username', 'last_viewed']) && newData.childrenCount <= 3 && newData.child('count').isNumber() && newData.child('count').val() >= 1 && newData.child('count').val() <= 1000 && newData.child('username').isString() && newData.child('username').val().length <= 50 && newData.child('last_viewed').isNumber()
